tasks.title: Register media routes and verify env vars in apps/api
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-001, GAP-078-003, GAP-078-025.
(already done in commits f0d9d2fc, 9ec6a723 — see already-done.md)

Phase 0 blockers:
- GAP-078-001: Register /api/v1/admin/media and /api/v1/protected/media in apps/api/src/routes/index.ts
- GAP-078-003: Add @repo/media workspace:* to apps/api/package.json
- GAP-078-025: Add 4 Cloudinary env vars to ApiEnvSchema Zod in apps/api/src/utils/env.ts

Acceptance: routes mounted, pnpm typecheck passes, startup fails fast with missing vars.

tasks.title: Fix mediaProvider injection in _afterHardDelete handlers
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-002.
(already done in commit 3747b982 — see already-done.md)

Inject mediaProvider via getMediaProvider() per-request in all 5 hardDelete.ts handlers:
- apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/admin/hardDelete.ts
- apps/api/src/routes/destination/admin/hardDelete.ts
- apps/api/src/routes/event/admin/hardDelete.ts
- apps/api/src/routes/post/admin/hardDelete.ts
- apps/api/src/routes/user/admin/hardDelete.ts

Acceptance: pnpm test passes; mock provider receives deleteByPrefix call after entity hardDelete.

tasks.title: Add MEDIA_UPLOAD / MEDIA_DELETE permissions and entity-validation helper
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-053, GAP-078-164.
(already done in commit e40c32f3 — see already-done.md)

- Add MEDIA_UPLOAD and MEDIA_DELETE to PermissionEnum in @repo/schemas
- Upload/delete routes use requiredPermissions
- Helper apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/permissions.ts validates entity-specific perms
- rolePermissions seed grants both to SUPER_ADMIN, ADMIN, EDITOR, HOST
- Mounting bug fixed (upload sub-app scoped to /upload path)
- 14+ test cases in permission-gate.test.ts

Acceptance: 403 without MEDIA_UPLOAD; 403 with MEDIA_UPLOAD but no entity perm; 200 with both.

tasks.title: Reconstruct missing manual migrations 0016-0020
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-188, GAP-078-189, GAP-078-187.

Audit apply-postgres-extras.sh, triggers-manifest.md, ADR-017, git log to reconstruct:
- packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0016_search_index_view.sql (materialized view)
- packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0017_set_updated_at_trigger.sql
- packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0018_delete_entity_bookmarks_trigger.sql
- packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0019_chk_limit_adjustments_type.sql
- packages/db/src/migrations/manual/0020_gallery_max_constraint.sql

Also fix orphan 0002_kind_wolfpack entry (GAP-078-189): remove from _journal.json if no matching SQL.
Also add UNIQUE INDEX search_index_entity_key (GAP-078-187): register in apply-postgres-extras.sh.

Acceptance: pnpm db:fresh on clean clone completes without error; apply-postgres-extras.sh is idempotent; _journal.json references only entries with corresponding SQL files.

Execution plan:
1. Audit sub-step (read-only): produce .claude/specs/SPEC-078-GAPS/fase1b-migration-audit.md with SQL object mapping + prototypes.
2. Implementation sub-step: write migration files per audit.
3. Verification sub-step: pnpm db:fresh-dev on clean clone + apply-postgres-extras.sh.

subtasks.title: Audit: produce fase1b-migration-audit.md with SQL mapping + prototypes
Implementation: write manual SQL files 0001-0010 (renumbered clean sequence)
Rewrite apply-postgres-extras.sh as generic orchestrator (iterates manual/*.sql)
Add db:apply-extras wrapper; chain from db:reset, db:fresh, db:fresh-dev
Teach script to auto-load apps/api/.env.local when URL not in env
Verification: pnpm db:fresh-dev end-to-end + 3 constraints + MV + 43 triggers

tasks.title: Security: env-prefix validation on DELETE and path-traversal refine
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-035, GAP-078-034, GAP-078-173.

File: apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/delete.ts
- GAP-078-035: DELETE validates env prefix via resolveEnvironment(); return HTTP 403 if publicId does not start with hospeda/{currentEnv}/
- GAP-078-034+173: Add .refine(s => !s.includes('..') && !decodeURIComponent(s).includes('..')) to DeleteMediaQuerySchema in @repo/schemas

Acceptance: DELETE with publicId=hospeda/prod/x in non-prod returns 403; DELETE ?publicId=hospeda/dev/../prod/x returns 422.

tasks.title: Security: magic-bytes validation, decompression-bomb guard, and pixel-count reject
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-103, GAP-078-104, GAP-078-105.

File: packages/media/src/validate-media-file.ts
- GAP-078-103+104: Add dep file-type; validateMediaFile validates magic-bytes match declared MIME; reject pixel count > 2e8 with DECOMPRESSION_BOMB error code
- GAP-078-105: Upload options: invalidate: true, exif: false, faces: false (passed through validateMediaFile call)

Acceptance: JPEG with PNG magic-bytes rejected 422; PNG 15001x15001 rejected 422 DECOMPRESSION_BOMB; valid JPEG with matching magic-bytes passes.

tasks.title: Security: Cloudinary provider hardening — cloudName regex, stream error, folder assertion
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-057, GAP-078-027, GAP-078-112.

File: packages/media/src/cloudinary.provider.ts
- GAP-078-057: Validate config.cloudName regex /^[a-z0-9_-]+$/ in provider constructor; throw at construction if invalid
- GAP-078-027: Add stream.on('error', reject) in uploadBuffer() so stream errors surface as rejected promises
- GAP-078-112: Provider upload() asserts options.folder?.startsWith('hospeda/') at start; throws InvalidFolderError if not

Acceptance: new CloudinaryProvider({ cloudName: 'my cloud!' }) throws at construction; stream error causes promise reject (not silent hang); upload without 'hospeda/' folder throws InvalidFolderError.

tasks.title: Security: actor-UUID validation and session re-verify before provider call
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-058, GAP-078-175, GAP-078-114.

File: apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/upload.ts
- GAP-078-058+175: z.string().uuid().safeParse(actor.id) before using as publicId component; sanitized 500 if fails
- GAP-078-114: Re-verify session (actor.id matches current session) right before provider call; abort with 401 if stale

Acceptance: non-UUID actor.id does not reach Cloudinary; stale session detected and returns 401; valid UUID proceeds normally.

tasks.title: Security: getMediaUrl SSRF guards, extractPublicId hostname fix, and prod-cleanup env var
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-109, GAP-078-182, GAP-078-117, GAP-078-234, GAP-078-113.

Files: packages/media/src/get-media-url.ts, packages/media/src/extract-public-id.ts, packages/seed/src/cli.ts, apps/api/vercel.json
- GAP-078-109: extractPublicId uses new URL(url).hostname === 'res.cloudinary.com' instead of .includes() to prevent subdomain spoofing
- GAP-078-182: getMediaUrl option raw allowlists transform tokens (w_,h_,c_,q_,f_,g_,ar_,dpr_,e_); reject unknown tokens
- GAP-078-117+234: HOSPEDA_ALLOW_PROD_CLEANUP=true required for --clean-images in prod; exit 1 if missing
- GAP-078-113: apps/api/vercel.json per-route maxBodySize: "12mb" for upload routes

Acceptance: extractPublicId('https://evil.res.cloudinary.com.attacker.com/...') returns null; getMediaUrl with unknown token throws; seed --clean-images in prod without var exits code 1.

tasks.title: Schema alignment: MediaSchema.featuredImage optional, ImageSchema publicId and attribution
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-185, GAP-078-163, GAP-078-196, GAP-078-116.

File: packages/schemas/src/common/media.schema.ts
- GAP-078-185+163: MediaSchema.featuredImage -> .optional()
- GAP-078-196: ImageSchema adds publicId: z.string().min(1).optional()
- GAP-078-116: ImageSchema adds attribution?: { photographer?, sourceUrl?, license? }

Acceptance: MediaSchema.parse({}) succeeds; ImageSchema.parse({ url: '...', publicId: 'hospeda/dev/x' }) succeeds; ImageSchema.parse({ url: '...', attribution: { photographer: 'Jane' } }) succeeds.

tasks.title: Schema compat policy: additive-only documentation and historic shape fixtures
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-122, GAP-078-201.

Files: packages/schemas/CLAUDE.md, packages/schemas/test/common/media.schema.compat.test.ts
- GAP-078-122+201: Document additive-only policy in packages/schemas/CLAUDE.md; create media.schema.compat.test.ts with historic shape fixtures; fixture { url, moderationState } passes ImageSchema.safeParse

Acceptance: packages/schemas/CLAUDE.md states additive-only policy; compat test file exists; fixture { url, moderationState } passes; pnpm test passes.

tasks.title: DB nullability alignment: DROP NOT NULL on posts/destinations media + $type fix + media shape CHECK
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-184, GAP-078-180, GAP-078-080, GAP-078-075.

Files: packages/db/src/schemas/*.dbschema.ts, packages/db/src/migrations/manual/*.sql
- GAP-078-184+180+080: Migration ALTER TABLE posts/destinations ALTER COLUMN media DROP NOT NULL; change $type<Media>() to $type<Media | null>() in all 4 entities; update derived types in @repo/schemas
- GAP-078-075: Migration ADD CONSTRAINT chk_{entity}_media_shape CHECK (media IS NULL OR jsonb_typeof(media) = 'object') on accommodations/destinations/events/posts/post_sponsor; BaseCrudService._beforeCreate/_beforeUpdate run MediaSchema.safeParse when entity has media column

Acceptance: Insert post without media succeeds; TypeScript Drizzle type reflects Media | null; media = 'string'::jsonb fails with CHECK violation.

tasks.title: DB gallery max CHECK constraint migration
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-195.

File: packages/db/src/migrations/manual/
- Migration: ALTER TABLE {accommodations,destinations,events,posts} ADD CONSTRAINT chk_gallery_max_items CHECK (media IS NULL OR media->'gallery' IS NULL OR jsonb_array_length(media->'gallery') <= 50)

Acceptance: Insert with gallery.length = 51 fails with CHECK violation; insert with 50 succeeds.

tasks.title: Add users.image satellite columns migration and update UserService.updateAvatar
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-081, GAP-078-197.

Files: packages/db/src/migrations/manual/, packages/service-core/src/services/user.service.ts
- Migration: add nullable columns users.image_public_id text, users.image_moderation_state enum, users.image_caption text
- UserService.updateAvatar() sets all 3 on upload
- _afterHardDelete reads image_public_id directly (fallback to extractPublicId for legacy rows)
- Optional backfill script

Acceptance: UserService.updateAvatar() test asserts all 3 columns updated; hardDelete test uses column directly without URL parsing.

tasks.title: BaseModel JSONB merge semantics with transaction FOR UPDATE
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-186, GAP-078-198.

File: packages/db/src/base/base.model.ts
- GAP-078-186: BaseModel.update() uses sql`${table.media} || ${JSON.stringify(patch.media)}::jsonb` when entity declares mergeableJsonbColumns = ['media']
- GAP-078-198: Wrap JSONB merge path in SELECT ... FOR UPDATE transaction when entity has mergeableJsonbColumns

Acceptance: PATCH with { gallery: [] } on entity with existing featuredImage preserves featuredImage in DB; concurrent PATCH writers both values present in final state.

tasks.title: Extend delete_entity_bookmarks trigger for soft-delete
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-192.

File: packages/db/src/migrations/manual/ + packages/db/scripts/apply-postgres-extras.sh
- Extend trigger delete_entity_bookmarks to also fire AFTER UPDATE when OLD.deleted_at IS NULL AND NEW.deleted_at IS NOT NULL

Acceptance: soft-delete accommodation -> bookmarks for that entity are removed from DB.

tasks.title: Restructure @repo/media subpath exports bundle architecture
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-126, GAP-078-162, GAP-078-183, GAP-078-172, GAP-078-177.

Files: packages/media/package.json, packages/media/tsup.config.ts, packages/media/src/server/index.ts, packages/media/src/test-utils/index.ts, packages/media/src/index.ts
- Root index.ts: browser-safe only (getMediaUrl, MEDIA_PRESETS, extractPublicId, generateGalleryId, types)
- src/server/index.ts: server-only (CloudinaryProvider, uploadBuffer, validateMediaFile, resolveEnvironment)
- src/test-utils/index.ts: InMemoryImageProvider
- package.json exports field with 3 subpath entries
- tsup.config.ts with 3 entries + external: ['cloudinary', 'image-size']
- Biome rule prevents admin/web from importing @repo/media/server
- Vite/Astro optimizeDeps.exclude: ['cloudinary', 'image-size']

Acceptance: import CloudinaryProvider from '@repo/media' fails TypeScript; from '@repo/media/server' succeeds; pnpm build:api completes without Cloudinary SDK in browser chunk.

tasks.title: Add InMemoryImageProvider and extractAllMediaPublicIds to @repo/media
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-102, GAP-078-082, GAP-078-229.

Files: packages/media/src/test-utils/mock-provider.ts, packages/media/src/server/extract-all-public-ids.ts, apps/api/src/services/media.ts
- GAP-078-102: InMemoryImageProvider implementing ImageProvider; exported via @repo/media/test-utils
- GAP-078-082: extractAllMediaPublicIds(entity, opts?) traversing media.featuredImage, gallery[], videos[]
- GAP-078-229: getMediaProvider() auto-uses InMemoryImageProvider in dev when Cloudinary creds missing

Acceptance: InMemoryImageProvider.upload() stores in-memory and returns valid URL; entity with featuredImage + 3 gallery items returns 4 publicIds; in dev without creds returns InMemoryImageProvider.

tasks.title: Add resetMediaProviderForTesting export and test-utils subpath
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-059, GAP-078-168.

Files: apps/api/src/services/media.ts, packages/media/src/test-utils/index.ts
- GAP-078-059+168: Export resetMediaProviderForTesting() from apps/api/src/services/media.ts guarded by NODE_ENV === 'test'; ensure it is also re-exported from @repo/media/test-utils subpath

Acceptance: resetMediaProviderForTesting() undefined in production build; importable from @repo/media/test-utils in test environment; calling it resets the provider singleton.

tasks.title: Create packages/media JSDoc and interface cleanup documentation
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-028, GAP-078-174, GAP-078-032, GAP-078-161.

Files: packages/media/src/cloudinary.provider.ts, packages/media/src/types.ts, .claude/specs/SPEC-078-cloudinary-image-management/spec.md
- GAP-078-028+174: JSDoc on CloudinaryProvider constructor: 'For internal use; access only via getMediaProvider(). SDK v2 uses global config state — multi-instance per process is unsupported.'
- GAP-078-032: Remove buildUrl from ImageProvider interface; getMediaUrl() covers it; amend SPEC-078 v1.5 -> v1.6
- GAP-078-161: Close as duplicate of GAP-078-032; note in spec

Acceptance: JSDoc visible in IDE hover; ImageProvider interface does not declare buildUrl; spec.md version updated to v1.6.

tasks.title: Create packages/media README.md and CLAUDE.md
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-047.

Files: packages/media/README.md, packages/media/CLAUDE.md
- GAP-078-047: Create packages/media/README.md (quickstart, exports table, presets table) + CLAUDE.md (patterns, race condition note, subpath import rules)

Acceptance: Both files exist with substantive content; README includes exports table and presets table; CLAUDE.md documents the race condition note.

tasks.title: Seed strategy refactor: seedSource required/example, processor counters, and resolveEnvironment
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-036, GAP-078-116, GAP-078-007, GAP-078-037, GAP-078-039.

Files: packages/seed/src/seedFactory.ts, packages/seed/src/cli.ts, packages/seed/src/cloudinary-image-processor.ts, packages/config/src/env-registry.hospeda.ts
- GAP-078-036+116: seedFactory.ts passes seedSource: 'required' | 'example'; processor early-returns for example; counter { uploaded, cached, failures, skippedExample } reported
- GAP-078-007: Replace process.env.NODE_ENV ?? 'development' with resolveEnvironment() in cli.ts:76, index.ts:95, seedFactory.ts:186
- GAP-078-037: role: 'gallery/${index}' instead of role: String(index)
- GAP-078-039: apps: ['api', 'seed'] in 4 Cloudinary entries of env-registry.hospeda.ts

Acceptance: pnpm db:seed with example sources completes without Cloudinary creds; gallery item at index 2 has role: 'gallery/2'; pnpm env:check validates Cloudinary vars for both api and seed apps.

tasks.title: Seed strategy: avatars path, moderation default, and spec amendment
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-008, GAP-078-063, GAP-078-019.

Files: packages/seed/src/cloudinary-image-processor.ts, .claude/specs/SPEC-078-cloudinary-image-management/spec.md
- GAP-078-008: Avatars seed path: hospeda/{env}/seed/avatars/{userId}.{ext} with entityType: 'avatars' override
- GAP-078-063: Seed processor injects moderationState: 'APPROVED' default if missing
- GAP-078-019: Amend SPEC-078 v1.5 -> v1.6 REQ-02: seed gallery uses array index; runtime admin uses nanoid

Acceptance: Seeded avatar publicId contains 'avatars/{userId}'; processed entity always has moderationState; spec.md REQ-02 updated.

tasks.title: Seed strategy: sponsor/organizer logo handling, MediaBlock videos, and MediaSchema validation
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-077, GAP-078-083, GAP-078-084.

Files: packages/seed/src/cloudinary-image-processor.ts, packages/seed/src/types.ts
- GAP-078-077: Processor handles postSponsor.logo (object {url}) and eventOrganizer.logo (string); paths postSponsor/{id}/logo and eventOrganizer/{id}/logo
- GAP-078-083: MediaBlock interface adds videos?: unknown[] pass-through
- GAP-078-084: MediaSchema.parse(processed.media) in seedFactory.ts after processEntityImages; fail loudly with Zod error if malformed

Acceptance: Seed completes without error for sponsor + event fixtures; MediaSchema.parse throws on malformed media; MediaBlock type accepts videos field.

tasks.title: Seed data: moderation state bulk-fix in destination JSONs and CLAUDE.md doc
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-076.

Files: packages/seed/data/destinations/*.json, packages/seed/CLAUDE.md
- GAP-078-076: Bulk-replace 'moderationState': 'PENDING' -> 'APPROVED' in 26 destination JSONs; add 1-2 REJECTED fixtures; document in packages/seed/CLAUDE.md

Acceptance: grep -r '"PENDING"' packages/seed/data/destinations returns 0; REJECTED fixtures exist; packages/seed/CLAUDE.md documents moderation state conventions.

tasks.title: Seed hardening: SSRF allowlist and --reset / --clean-images flag integration
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-030, GAP-078-006, GAP-078-078.

Files: packages/seed/src/
- GAP-078-030: Allowlist ['images.unsplash.com','images.pexels.com','res.cloudinary.com'] + isAllowedSeedUrl() in seed fetch; skip + log if URL not in allowlist
- GAP-078-006+078: --reset implies --clean-images for hospeda/{env}/seed/ prefix automatically; flags not mutually exclusive

Acceptance: Seed with URL from unlisted host logs warning and skips; pnpm db:seed --reset calls deleteByPrefix for seed prefix.

tasks.title: Seed hardening: cache flush, --validate-cache, cache schema Zod validation, and .gitignore
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-033, GAP-078-079, GAP-078-120, GAP-078-074.

Files: packages/seed/src/, root .gitignore
- GAP-078-033: Cache writes accumulate in memory during Promise.all; single flush at end
- GAP-078-079: Optional --validate-cache flag: HEAD each cached URL; remove stale entries
- GAP-078-120: Validate cache file shape with Zod on read; truncate orphan entries; add version field
- GAP-078-074: Add **/.cloudinary-cache.json to root .gitignore

Acceptance: Cache file not written until all uploads complete; --validate-cache removes entries returning non-200 HEAD; git status does not show cache file.

tasks.title: Seed hardening: admin max-size constant replacing hardcoded magic numbers
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-010.

File: apps/admin/src/lib/constants.ts
- Add DEFAULT_MEDIA_MAX_SIZE_BYTES = 5 * 1024 * 1024 constant (5 MiB, matches the 5242880 literal the spec referenced as '10 MiB' by mistake)
- Add DEFAULT_GALLERY_FALLBACK_MAX_SIZE_BYTES = 10 * 1024 * 1024 for GalleryField fallback
- Replace 7 hardcoded occurrences across apps/admin/src with the constants

Acceptance: no bare 5242880 or 5 * 1024 * 1024 literals remain in apps/admin/src production code (docstring @example in commonRules.ts intentionally kept).

tasks.title: API response contract: route factory status 200, ResponseFactory wrap, UploadResponseSchema, and moderationState
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-026, GAP-078-029, GAP-078-159, GAP-078-178, GAP-078-062, GAP-078-149.

Files: apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/upload.ts, packages/schemas/src/api/media/*.ts, apps/api/src/lib/route-factory.ts
- GAP-078-026+029+159+178: Add successStatusCode?: number to route factory interface; upload routes pass successStatusCode: 200; maintain ResponseFactory wrap {success, data, metadata}; UploadResponseSchema updated to wrapped shape; all success paths use factory
- GAP-078-062: Upload response adds moderationState: 'APPROVED'; UploadResponseSchema updated
- GAP-078-149: UploadResponseSchema.parse(response) at runtime in upload handler before returning

Acceptance: POST /admin/media/upload returns HTTP 200; response is { success: true, data: { moderationState: 'APPROVED' }, metadata: {} }; runtime schema parse catches malformed response.

tasks.title: API response contract: DELETE wasPresent flag and tags/overwrite forwarding
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-154, GAP-078-155.

Files: apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/delete.ts, packages/schemas/src/api/media/delete.schema.ts
- GAP-078-154: DELETE response adds wasPresent: boolean based on Cloudinary result === 'ok' vs 'not found'
- GAP-078-155: Forward tags and overwrite from upload route to provider

Acceptance: DELETE on existing asset returns { wasPresent: true }; DELETE on missing asset returns { wasPresent: false }; upload with tags array calls provider with tags forwarded.

tasks.title: Request schema refinements: discriminatedUnion role and ENTITY_FOLDER_MAP
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-153, GAP-078-055.

Files: packages/schemas/src/api/media/upload.schema.ts, apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/upload.ts
- GAP-078-153: Refactor AdminUploadRequestSchema to z.discriminatedUnion('role', [...]) with branches featured and gallery; ProtectedUploadRequestSchema has implicit role avatar
- GAP-078-055: ENTITY_FOLDER_MAP explicit: { accommodation: 'accommodations', destination: 'destinations', event: 'events', post: 'posts' }

Acceptance: parse({ role: 'featured', entityType: 'user' }) fails with clear error; ENTITY_FOLDER_MAP exhaustive over all entity types; TypeScript error for unknown role.

tasks.title: Request schema refinements: empty file reject and env-configurable max size
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-148, GAP-078-106.

Files: apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/upload.ts, apps/api/src/utils/env.ts
- GAP-078-148: Reject file.size === 0 with 422 EMPTY_FILE before multipart validation
- GAP-078-106: HOSPEDA_MEDIA_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB: z.coerce.number().positive().default(10) in ApiEnvSchema

Acceptance: POST with empty file returns 422 EMPTY_FILE; HOSPEDA_MEDIA_MAX_FILE_SIZE_MB=abc at startup causes Zod error; max size enforced at runtime.

tasks.title: Defensive route hardening: rate limit, Content-Length margin, and gallery cap
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-068, GAP-078-021, GAP-078-071.

Files: apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/upload.ts, apps/api/src/routes/media/protected/upload.ts
- GAP-078-068: Interim rate limit { requests: 10, windowMs: 60000 } on upload routes; TODO comment linking to SPEC-079
- GAP-078-021: Content-Length pre-check uses maxBytes + 1024 margin
- GAP-078-071: Server hard cap 50 gallery items; reject 422 GALLERY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED; TODO comment for billing entitlements

Acceptance: 11th upload in 60s returns 429; entity gallery at 50 returns 422 GALLERY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED; Content-Length within margin is not pre-rejected.

tasks.title: Defensive route hardening: OpenAPI multipart schema, lazy services, and CORS doc
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-072, GAP-078-060, GAP-078-150.

Files: apps/api/src/routes/media/admin/upload.ts, apps/api/src/routes/media/protected/upload.ts, apps/api/docs/route-architecture.md
- GAP-078-072: OpenAPI requestBody multipart schema for upload routes via createAdminRoute factory
- GAP-078-060: Lazy services instantiation inside handler (not module-level)
- GAP-078-150: Document CORS contract for media routes in apps/api/docs/route-architecture.md

Acceptance: OpenAPI spec includes multipart requestBody for upload; no module-level const service = new XService() in route files; CORS section exists in route-architecture.md.

tasks.title: Add p-retry resilience to provider delete/deleteByPrefix
tasks.description:
Gaps: GAP-078-087, GAP-078-054.

Files: packages/media/src/cloudinary.provider.ts
- GAP-078-087: Add dep p-retry; delete() and deleteByPrefix() wrapped with pRetry({ retries: 3, factor: 3, minTimeout: 1000 }); retry on 429/5xx only; upload() has no retry; JSDoc on upload() noting 'no retry by design'
- GAP-078-054: delete_resources_by_prefix() passes { invalidate: true }

Acceptance: delete mock rejects once with 429 then resolves; pRetry callback invoked twice total; upload mock rejects -> no retry, promise rejects immediately.

tasks.title: Add i18n error keys for media error codes
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-139.

Files: packages/i18n/locales/es.json, packages/i18n/locales/en.json, packages/i18n/locales/pt.json, apps/api/src/routes/media/ error handlers
- Error codes map to i18n keys api.media.errors.{code} via @repo/i18n
- Response includes code for client
- Keys: api.media.errors.EMPTY_FILE, .GALLERY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED, .CLOUDINARY_NOT_CONFIGURED

Acceptance: Keys exist in es/en/pt locale files; response body includes code string.

tasks.title: Amend SPEC-078 v1.6: /users/me convention documentation fix
tasks.description:
Gap: GAP-078-009.

File: .claude/specs/SPEC-078-cloudinary-image-management/spec.md
- Amend SPEC-078 v1.5 -> v1.6 REQ-04.2-FLOW: AvatarUpload uses PATCH /api/v1/protected/users/${userId} with ownership check; note future /me pattern requires dedicated SPEC

Acceptance: SPEC-078 spec.md updated; no code change.

tasks.title: Admin UI: wire upload/delete for destinations, events, posts entity edit pages
tasks.description:

tasks.title: Migrate getMediaUrl() API extensions: fallback override, regex anchor, delivery-type detection
